check.name: GpsInfo must be not 0,0
check.description: This rule checks that if GPS information is provided as a list, all entries in that list have valid coordinates (i.e., latitude and longitude are not 0). If there is no list (GpsInfo is not an array), the rule automatically passes.

check.name: NO2 - Ossidi di azoto | datatype: NO2 - Ossidi di azoto | mperiod: 3600 | last 24h
check.category: NO2 - Ossidi di azoto | datatype: NO2 - Ossidi di azoto | mperiod: 3600 | last 24h
check.description: Timeseries for datatype "NO2 - Ossidi di azoto" sampled every 3600 seconds over the last 24 hours to now (24->0). Passes when mvalue exists, is numeric, and is greater than 0.

check.name: nitrogen-dioxide | datatype: nitrogen-dioxide | mperiod: 3600 | last 24h
check.description: Timeseries for datatype "nitrogen-dioxide" sampled every 3600 seconds over the last 24 hours to now (24->0). Passes when mvalue exists, is numeric, and is greater than 10.

check.name: ImageGallery must be a non-empty array
check.category: ImageGallery must be a non-empty array
check.description: This rule checks that the current accommodation item has an ImageGallery property that is an array containing at least one image object. If ImageGallery is not an array or is empty, the rule fails.

check.name: ImageGallery ValidFrom/ValidTo must include July
check.description: This rule checks that each image in ImageGallery has non-null ValidFrom and ValidTo fields, and that the month of July (7) is between the month of ValidFrom and ValidTo (inclusive). If ImageGallery is not an array, the rule automatically passes.
